description: RSSI threshold configuration for BLE proximity detection.

very_close.description: Device is within ~1 metre of the scanner.

close.description: Device is within ~3 metres of the scanner.

medium.description: Device is within ~5-7 metres. Default attendance threshold.

far.description: Device is within ~10 metres. Use for large classrooms.

ignore.description: Signals weaker than this are ignored entirely.

notes: RSSI is affected by walls, interference, and device hardware.
Calibrate by walking around the room with a phone and observing values.
Typical BLE phone at 5m in open space: -65 to -75 dBm.
